ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the performance metric */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being measured */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the parameter is measured */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the metric (e.g., timing, cycles) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average measured value for the parameter */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measured values */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "measurement_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the metric is measured */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device this configuration is associated with */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being set */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value being assigned to the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version loaded on the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the device was produced */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last tested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wakeup_times" (
  "wakeup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wakeup time entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which the wakeup time was collected */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric associated with the measurement */,
  "wakeup_time" REAL /* Measured time taken to wake up from a specific mode */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was recorded */,
  "current_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device at the time of measurement */,
  "operating_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wakeup time was measured */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., lab, field) */,
  "test_operator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wakeup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wakeup_times_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wakeup_times_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wakeup_times_test_operator FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the access */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used to access the system */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the firmware */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or fixes in the update */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the firmware update file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the firmware update file */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Digital signature of the firmware update file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the configuration change */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of any tests conducted after the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the change approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_change_history_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_change_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_change_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
